programmes.show_description: Officers pull over a high-performance vehicle after reports of the driver live streaming at speeds of over 170 miles an hour. And a driver crashes into a lorry after drinking heavily.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Nanny takes Ben and Holly to visit a witch in the forest. When Nanny is rude to the witch, she gets frozen by magic. (VS)
The Toy Cupboard: Peppa and George's toy basket is full, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard.
School Camp: Peppa and her friends go camping with their teacher. After pitching their tents and collecting sticks, they all sing a song around the campfire.
Fluff climbs into a wellington boot looking for his beloved Whizzy Button but can't get back out again! Tweedy to the rescue!
Scratch shares her love of building blocks with Magnus and Squiggle. Squiggle realises sometimes fun isn't just about building towers, but also about when they come toppling down!
...Big Adventures! Thomas travels with Shane into the centre of Australia's hot red desert, but Shane doesn't to stop to refuel.
When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.
Captain Daddy Pig: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat and head out for a day on the river. All is going well until the boat gets stuck in some long reeds!
There's a heatwave in Windsor Gardens. As Mateo has sold out of ice creams he creates a delicious new flavour with Paddington.
When Posy shows Pip her tune on the ukulele, he has a go and finds it easy, even adding some notes. Posy is jealous, but Pip explains it's all because of her excellent teaching.
Mayor Goodway dreams she's travelled to the mysterious Cluck-Cluck Island-a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty.
...Stage. When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the show.
Mr Bull arrives with his team to start work on Peppa's house renovation. Peppa and family move into the caravan in the garden while the work is being completed. It's a bit of a squeeze!
Peppa is excited to help George explore the world of sounds now he has his new hearing aid. She shows him her favourite sounds including the splashing of jumping in a muddy puddle!
Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.
Strange holes in garden fences are popping up all over Porthole and Stink has gone missing! Stan and Gran spy a mystery and decide to investigate...
Zuma and Hurricane Harrigan are about to go kitesurfing when a mighty wind sweeps them off the beach. It;s up to the PAW Patrol to find the stranded pals and rescue them.
When Milo, Lofty and Lark take care of Horatio's dentist surgery, they love making sure no one leaves without a dazzling smile!
Nanny Plum has a special secret that Ben and Holly are surprised to discover when they see her going out during the night to collect the teeth of children.
George enjoys seeing his reflection in the mirror so much that he and Peppa try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.
Leonardo is convinced that Odo saved his life and sticks to Odo like glue causing Odo a lot of trouble.
Olivia discovers why things float or sink, learning about density and liquids. (Ep2)
Kiera reads a beautifully illustrated and interactive book that makes learning numbers fun for little ones, while they keep an eye out for diving and skateboarding chicks!

A stolen artifact becomes the centrepiece of a heist that leaves a security guard dead. And with Jack's future on the line, Kate must decide whether to fight for the man she loves.
After years performing as solo singer, Kayleigh's started her own girl group and today they have their first paying performance, a wedding gig, with 100 guests.

We meet the Chief Executive of Moor Trees as well as volunteers who help restore trees to ensure Dartmoor becomes a stronger and more resilient landscape in the future.

Jeremy Vine presides over a masterclass in puzzle solving, led by captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay. Their guests are impressionist Jon Culshaw and comedian Stephen Bailey.
Can Peter Wright put a spaniel who's been hit by a car on the road to recovery? Matt Smith discovers ten eggs when he x-rays a giant tortoise. Shona Searson tends to a pedigree cow.
Sharon D Clarke returns as DCI Ellis. When the leader of a prison reform campaign is found murdered in his small village, a tangled picture of old grudges quickly emerges.

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: Behind the scenes with specialist revenue protection teams at some of the UK's biggest rail operators as we follow their battles with suspected fare evaders on the network.

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Agents Sam and Mark pursue a debt from a man who owes nearly £5k in legal fees. In London, Vlad must recover nearly £35k in unpaid rent - but the debtor lives in Dubai.
A traveller's account of being robbed at gunpoint turns out to be a lie. When a man's cellar floods with raw sewage the smell of fraud is unmistakable.

programmes.show_description: Holly and Ben help the Wise Old Elf play a trick on Nanny Plum. She doesn't see the funny side, so decides to turn him into a giant snail! (VS)
The Power Cut: When a power cut plunges their house into darkness, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.
Bouncy Ball: George feels left out when Peppa and Suzy Sheep start playing tennis.
When Fluff gets covered in chocolate spread, Tweedy accidentally discovers that a little tender loving care is the best way to get a mucky Fluff washed!
When Squiggle doesn't have anything to do in the treehouse, Fluff and Nok-nok tell him about the importance of staying healthy. Squiggle and friends create a fun keep-fit routine.
...Big Adventures! Emily gets her wish for an adventure when she is asked to take the Sodor Rangers up to Callan Castle...
Charlie and Bronwyn take the kids on a sailing lesson, but Charlie feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. Trying to win back the kids' attention, Charlie ends up sinking the boat.
Peppa and George look at the stars with Mummy and Daddy Pig.
Paddington hurts his knee & goes to see Dr Yasmin. When she steps out, he steps UP and is mistaken for a doctor.
When Posy congratulates Pip on some chalk drawings in the park, he takes the credit rather than admit they aren't his. But who is the mystery artist?
Mayor Humdinger's garbage-compacting truck is messing up the beach. It's up to Rocky to help save a rescue.
Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.
With the building work complete, it's time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. It's dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick?
Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.
When a storm keeps the Rexes at home, they must think of a game to pass the time.
Grumblestunk is sure she saw an enormous banana when she walked Stink on the beach early that morning and Stan and Gran spy a mystery - but no banana!
...from Home. Mayor Humdinger takes his trailer and his kitties out for a vacation. But when his driving lands them at the tippy top of a tall spire, the PAW Patrol must rescue them.
When Milo, Lofty and Lark report into Mission Control they're soon on their way to the moon to save Mila's precious space strawberries!
King Thistle demands bread for his royal breakfast, but there is no flour to be found in the castle.
The playgroup is going on a trip to the museum. Everyone is on the bus ready to go, except Pedro Pony. Where is he?
Odo and Doodle are given the job of explaining an eclipse to the other campers, but when they accidentally forget, the other campers burst into pandemonium as the sun disappears.
Olivia learns about acid and alkali, when creating a secret message. (Ep3)
Jen tells a story in which Noah brings his favourite storybook to school - but all the characters escape, causing havoc! Will Noah be able to catch them all and read his book to class?

programmes.show_name: New: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
programmes.show_description: Alice follows a cancer patient's treatment, while uncovering pioneering plastic surgery and stories of courage and innovation during the Plague and World War I. (Ep4)
With most leads on Peter's murder now exhausted, the sudden disappearance of a local boy ignites a new urgency, pulling the duo back into a desperate search. Sharon D Clarke stars.
Behind the surgeon's mask - from the pressurised operating theatre to life at home - as consultant heart surgeon Inder Birdi faces one of the most challenging cases of his career.
